description_long: This object consists of a group of four stylized palm trees, each with slender, brown trunks and lush, green fronds radiating from the top. The trees vary in height and trunk curvature, with some trunks arching gracefully while others stand more upright. The fronds are arranged in a whorled pattern, with clusters of coconuts visible beneath the leaves. The foliage is dense at the crown, creating a tropical appearance typical of coconut palms. The trunks are relatively thin compared to the height of the trees, and the bases are not flared or buttressed. No roots are visible above the ground, and the trees are grouped closely together, suggesting a small grove suitable for parks or urban landscaping.
description: A group of four stylized palm trees with slender brown trunks and dense green fronds, some bearing coconuts, arranged in a small grove.
description_view_0: Four palm trees are visible from the side, showing varying trunk curvatures and dense green fronds.
description_view_1: A single palm tree is seen from the front, displaying a straight trunk and a symmetrical crown of fronds.
description_view_2: The group of four palm trees is viewed from the opposite side, highlighting the arching trunks and leafy crowns.
description_view_3: A single palm tree is seen from the back, with a straight trunk and a full, layered canopy of fronds.
